feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets:
# Singletrack Sessions — Episode
## Building Trails That Last
Host: Maya
Guest: Liam
Maya: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions.
Today we're talking about trail building, and I'm joined by Liam, trail builder for the Cascadia Alliance.
Excited for this one — trail building is something I've been thinking about a lot.
